name: Potato Kugel
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except chicken fat in a large bowl and mix well.
2. Heat the fat in a large skillet or sauté pan over medium heat. Add potato mixture in small batches, sauteing for 1 minute before removing to a baking dish.
3. Repeat with remaining potato mixture.
4. Bake at 375°F until golden brown.
5. Serve hot.
